background: This feature addresses the need for a unified contract schema pack that consolidates all 17 artifact contracts into a single location with machine-readable JSON Schema definitions.
feature_goal: Create a unified Contract Schema Pack that enables downstream systems to programmatically discover and validate contracts.

requirement_to_design_mapping.requirement_text: Single source of truth for registry

design_summary: The Contract Schema Pack consolidates all 17 artifact contracts into a unified directory structure with JSON Schema files for automated validation and a registry for contract discovery.

constraints.impact: All schemas must use this specification

assumptions.description: All 17 markdown contracts are stable and complete
assumptions.risk_if_wrong: Incomplete contracts would cause schema inconsistencies
assumptions.validation_method: Verify contracts exist and have defined fields

open_questions.question: Should schemas be JSON or YAML?
